summary: Completed testing of 'Actualizar stock' sync button feature in Stock Dashboard. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests pass (100%) for Odoo sync API. Frontend: All sync features working - green button visible, shows 'Sincronizando...' during sync, displays success toast, updates last sync time, and refreshes cube data.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (th/span/tr nesting) - cosmetic, already noted in iteration_10

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/odoo-sync/job-status returns STOCK_QUANTS job info with last_run_at, last_success_at, last_error fields
Backend: GET /api/odoo-sync/job-status with invalid job_code returns 404
Backend: POST /api/odoo-sync/run with invalid job_code returns 404
Backend: POST /api/odoo-sync/run with STOCK_QUANTS starts sync (returns ok=true, run_id, status=RUNNING)
Backend: POST /api/odoo-sync/run twice quickly returns 409 'Ya hay un sync en progreso'
Backend: Sync completes successfully (status changes from RUNNING to OK with rows_upserted)
Backend: Both endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
Frontend: Green 'Actualizar stock' button visible in top bar with data-testid='sync-stock-btn'
Frontend: Last sync time displayed (data-testid='last-sync-time') showing 'Sync: dd/mm, hh:mm'
Frontend: Click sync button → button shows 'Sincronizando...' with disabled state
Frontend: After sync completes → success toast 'Stock actualizado (X filas)' shown
Frontend: Cube refreshes after sync (loading spinner appears, data reloads)
Frontend: Dashboard loads correctly with all panels after sync completes
critical_code_review_comments: Global _sync_running flag prevents concurrent syncs - working correctly
Background task uses asyncio.create_task for non-blocking sync
Frontend polls /job-status every 3s until status != RUNNING - correct implementation
Sync button disabled during sync to prevent double-clicking - good UX
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data and real Odoo instance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Odoo sync feature complete. Key endpoints: POST /api/odoo-sync/run (starts STOCK_QUANTS sync), GET /api/odoo-sync/job-status (polls for completion). Sync connects to real Odoo via XML-RPC using config from finanzas3.x_odoo_config. Typical incremental sync pulls ~0-50 rows. Frontend button at data-testid='sync-stock-btn', last sync time at data-testid='last-sync-time'. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_odoo_sync.py covers all sync functionality.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No critical issues found. All features working correctly.
